title: One Sided
description: Client Side modpack that combines general QoL changes, Optimization and pretty visuals!
body:
# Welcome to One Sided!

One Sided is a carefully curated client-side modpack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience without changing the core gameplay. It brings together a collection of high-quality QoL tweaks, powerful performance optimizations, and stunning visual enhancements to make your world smoother, clearer, and more immersive than ever.

If you encounter any bugs, direct message me on discord!
@theycallmeud
